{{Quote|Yesti, send ''Virulence'' our thanks. Tell them their sacrifice will be remembered—a sacrifice that allowed us to destroy Wedge Antilles and hasten the Empire's rebirth|Captain [[Joak Drysso]]|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] '''Yesti''' was the [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' during the [[Bacta War]].

{{Char-stub}}
